causal_model: IEF four-case criterion: ext-ext via He-Rideout (shooting=False); ext->int radial exact; int->ext always False; int-int radial exact with outgoing-null upper bound; non-radial undecided
notes: ['horizon_crossing_links counts ext->int links in the transitive reduction.', 'Dou-Sorkin: N_links ~ A / l_Planck^2 = 16 pi M^2 in Planck units.', 'Non-radial interior pairs are undecided; they contribute to undecided_pairs.', 'ordering_fraction denominator is possible_pairs (null = unknown, not non-causal).', 'solver_coverage = decided_pairs / possible_pairs is a solver completeness metric.']
